subject: FW: Victoria's Secret - Middle East - URGENT
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 

-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew L. [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Saturday, November 10, 2007 11:07 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Victoria's Secret - Middle East - URGENT

I just rec'd the attached from sultan's guys. Is this at all true?  We
want to be the ones to do this, as you know. What do we ned to do now?
Pls read:

Hi Andrew,

I hope you are well. I have just been informed that the Apparel Group
from Dubai , owned by an Indian businessman Mr. Nilesh Ved , are about
to finalise Victoria Secrets for the M.E. They have had the management
in Dubai on two occasions and already operate the La Senza brand ,
recently purchased by VS.If we are not able to secure VS on our own I
would like to pursue a JV with Apparel.
I look forward to hearing from you.

Regards,

Graham Dreverman
--------------------------------------------------------

you are not the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any

notify the sender immediately by replying to the message and please
delete it from your system. Please also note that any views or opinions
